content:
Pisces September 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeCommit to the other, then settle the worth
Key DatesNew Moon Sep 11 (Virgo, 7th house) / Sun into Libra Sep 22 / Aries Harvest Full Moon Sep 26 (2nd house)
Love7th house New Moon is one of 2026's biggest partnership chapters
CareerPartnership-led work peaks early; income and worth climax late
Crystal of the MonthClear Quartz
Lucky ColorsSea violet, moonlit silver, clear white
Lucky Number7
AffirmationI meet the other fully; I let the worth settle.

This Month's Energy

Pisces, September 2026 commits to the partnership and settles the worth. The New Moon in Virgo on September 11 falls in your 7th house of partnership, marriage, and contracts — one of the clearest relationship fresh-starts of the year, a turning point around a marriage, a business partnership, a contract, or a significant other. Then September 26 brings the Harvest Full Moon in Aries, falling in your 2nd house of income, self-worth, and material resources — a climax around a money chapter, a worth threshold, or a new income direction. September's pattern is: commit to the partnership early, then settle the worth late.

Key Dates for Pisces in September 2026

DateTransitMeaning for PiscesDo / Avoid
Sep 11New Moon in Virgo7th house — fresh start in partnership, marriage, contracts, significant others; commit to the bondDo: commit, sign the contract, marry, name the partnership
Avoid: running from a relationship decision that has been building
Sep 22Sun enters Libra (equinox)8th house season — shared resources, intimacy, debts, depth through late OctoberDo: renegotiate shared money, address intimacy, settle the debt
Avoid: power struggles over shared resources
Sep 26Harvest Full Moon in Aries2nd house — income, self-worth, material resources climax; a long-building money chapter or worth threshold reaches a turning pointDo: set the new rate, sign the income contract, name what your work is worth
Avoid: financial decisions made in panic
Sep 9Venus enters Scorpio (your 9th)Warmth toward belief, travel, teaching, and the wider view through OctoberDo: date the wider view, romance the trip, learn with love
Avoid: undervaluing the wisdom you carry
Sep 26–OctMars enters Capricorn11th house — friendship, community, future vision become action zones through NovemberDo: widen the circle, lead the group, share the future
Avoid: going it alone when allies are visible
Sep 4Mercury enters Virgo (your 7th)Partnership and contract conversations sharpen; the agreement finds its wordsDo: sign the contract, have the partnership conversation, refine the terms
Avoid: avoiding the partnership conversation

Career & Money

For Pisces, September's career story pivots around partnership-led work. The Virgo New Moon on September 11 falls in your 7th house of partnership and contracts — a fresh start around a significant business partnership, contract, or collaboration. New moons in the 7th house often mark the beginning (or renegotiation) of a major working alliance.

The Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 falls in your 2nd house of income and self-worth — a climax around a money chapter, a new income direction, a worth threshold, or a rate reset. Combined with the Sun entering Libra (your 8th house of shared resources) on September 22 and Venus entering Scorpio (your 9th house of teaching and publishing) on September 9, the second half strongly favors money reorganization and wider-view work. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is commit to the partnership early, then settle the rate late.

Love & Relationships

The Virgo New Moon on September 11 falls in your 7th house of partnership and marriage — for Pisces, this is the love signature of 2026's second half. A long-building relationship decision, contract, marriage, or partnership fresh-starts here. New moons in the 7th house often mark major relationship chapters.

The Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 falls in your 2nd house of self-worth — worth and partnership are linked; how you value yourself now shapes what you accept in relationship. Venus entering Scorpio (your 9th house) on September 9 opens warmth around shared belief, travel, and teaching. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is letting the worth settle so the partnership can land cleanly.

Health & Wellness

September's wellness story emphasizes the back half of the body and the lymph. The Virgo New Moon on September 11 (your 7th house) can surface held tension in the lower back and hips (the relationship zone) — gentle movement and partner-style practices (walking with a partner, partner yoga) are especially helpful.

After the Sun enters Libra (your 8th house of release and recovery) on September 22, the medicine is depth-rest and private recovery. Clear Quartz, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with clarity, focus, amplification, and intention — a useful symbolic companion for a watery sign needing consolidation. Neptune-ruled (modern) and Jupiter-ruled (traditional) Pisces carries tension in the feet and lymphatic system; gentle foot massage, lymphatic movement (walking, swimming), and clear boundaries are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Clear Quartz

Why Clear Quartz fits Pisces this month. You are Neptune-ruled (modern) and Jupiter-ruled (traditional), and September asks you to commit to the partnership (7th house) before settling the worth (2nd house). Clear Quartz — traditionally tied to clarity, focus, amplification, and intention — is the stone that holds Pisces' watery nature coherent while relationship and money reorganize. Where Amethyst would calm further and Aquamarine would soften, Clear Quartz clarifies. Perfect for the 7th house Virgo New Moon (commit) and the 2nd house Aries Full Moon (settle the worth). The water-sign sensitivity meets a stone that channels it into choice.

How to use it during September 2026. Hold Clear Quartz over your heart for 5 minutes before any partnership conversation in the days around September 11 (the 7th house New Moon). Place it where you do money work on September 26 (the 2nd house Full Moon).

Best date to use it: September 26, the Aries Harvest Full Moon in your 2nd house — hold Clear Quartz at your third eye for 5 minutes before any money or worth conversation, naming what your work is now worth.

Read more: Clear Quartz Meaning and Best Crystals for Pisces.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Pisces — September 2026

When: September 26, the Aries Harvest Full Moon in your 2nd house.
Crystal: Clear Quartz.
Intention: Let the worth settle; let the partnership land cleanly.

  1. Cleanse Clear Quartz under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of September 11 (the 7th house New Moon). Let it sit on your nightstand through the 11th.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Full Moon (September 11–26): write down one number — the rate, the price, the savings goal — that reflects what your work is now worth, given the partnership that just landed.
  3. Act at the 2nd house Harvest Full Moon on September 26: communicate the rate, sign the contract, open the new account. Clear Quartz in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Pisces New Moon in late February / early March 2027 (your 1st house): how has the self settled now that the worth and the partnership have aligned? Hold Clear Quartz during the review.

Shop Pisces Crystals for September 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Pisces crystal guide for stones connected with intuition, clarity, compassion, and partnership — including the Clear Quartz that holds your watery nature coherent while relationship and money reorganize. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Pisces September 2026

Is September 2026 a good month for Pisces?

It's a partnership-and-worth month. The Virgo New Moon on September 11 (your 7th house) is one of 2026's clearest relationship fresh-starts. The Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 (your 2nd house) brings a money or worth climax.

How will the Virgo New Moon on September 11 affect Pisces?

It falls in your 7th house of partnership, marriage, and contracts. Expect a turning point around a marriage, business partnership, contract, or significant new bond. Commit; sign; say yes.

What does the Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 mean for Pisces?

It falls in your 2nd house of income, self-worth, and material resources — a climax around a money chapter, a worth threshold, or a new income direction. Set the new rate; sign the income contract.

What is the best crystal for Pisces in September 2026?

Clear Quartz — it holds the watery nature coherent while relationship and money reorganize, exactly what a 7th house Virgo New Moon (commit) plus a 2nd house Aries Full Moon (worth) demand. See the full Pisces crystal guide →

Why are partnership and money linked for Pisces in September 2026?

The 7th house (partnership) New Moon on September 11 often brings a working alliance; the 2nd house (worth) Full Moon on September 26 then resets the rate or income direction. The worth you settle on after the 26th should reflect what the partnership made visible.
